headline: PPG names recipients of 2025 Excellent Supplier Awards
summary: PITTSBURGH, June 26, 2026--PPG (NYSE: PPG) today announced the recipients of its 2025 Excellent Supplier Awards. The annual awards recognize suppliers whose performance has consistently exceeded requirements based on commercial value, quality, innovation, sustainability, responsiveness, service, delivery, documentation, quality, value add, and compliance. The Excellent Supplier Awards program applies to the company’s global supply base, which includes direct (raw materials), indirect, logistics
